resources:
Ubau: Techno Thief
Home Page In a world dominated by technocrats, humanity has built concrete towers to reach the heavens. Below, life is a shadow of the past. You play as a child scavenger, dodging a strict robotic curfew to find money to pay for your sick mother\'s insurance. OUT NOW ON EVERY SHADOW IS A SANCTUARY; EVERY NOISE IS A THREAT. TECHNO THIEF UBAU: BUY NOW | £15.99 AVAILABLE NOW GENRE • Stealth Survival LENGTH 6 hrs AGE PEGI 16+ ESRB T ★★★★★ \"A stunning atmospheric experience.\" — GAMESPOT \"Hauntingly beautiful world design.\" — IGN

Be the first to play. Sign up for early access. Behind-the-scenes artwork from the world of The Bleached City. Early access to three exclusive tracks from the game. High-resolution wallpaper for desktop and mobile.

SYMP Studio A dedicated team of SAE students who collaborated on the creation of the Ubau application.
Serjay Antsibor Pavlo Bairamkulov Merve Uzuner Yulia Haponchak
Worked on the overall app structure and UI implementation, including fragment navigation and layout design. Contributed to building reusable components and integrating core features across the project. Focused on backend logic and application functionality. Implemented key features, handled data processing, and supported integration between UI and core app logic to ensure stable performance. Responsible for UI/UX design and visual consistency. Designed interface elements, improved user experience flow, and helped refine the app’s overall look and usability. Worked on feature implementation and testing. Assisted in debugging, improving app stability, and ensuring smooth interaction between different parts of the application.
Github LinkedIn
Follow Us!
Discord Insta Youtube Twitter
Absent Mind Studio Meet the people behind Absent Mind Studio — a team dedicated to crafting memorable gaming experiences. Meet the Team Rhiannon Worked on the overall app structure and UI implementation, including fragment navigation and layout design. Contributed to building reusable components and integrating core features across the project."
GAMEPLAY
What type of game is The Bleached City? The Bleached City is a story-driven exploration game that combines environmental puzzles, atmospheric world-building, and narrative discovery.
How long is the game? An average playthrough takes around 6–8 hours, depending on your exploration style and how much optional content you discover.
Is there multiplayer? No. The game is designed as a single-player experience focused on immersion and storytelling.
Does the game have controller support? Yes. Full controller support is available alongside keyboard and mouse controls.
Is the game available in my language? The game launches with English support. Additional languages may be added in future updates.
PURCHASE
How do I purchase the game? The game can be purchased through supported digital storefronts once it becomes available.
Can I get a refund? Refunds are handled according to the refund policy of the platform where you purchased the game.
Will there be a demo? There are currently no plans for a public demo, but announcements will be shared if that changes.
Is there a physical edition? At launch, the game will be available digitally only. A physical edition may be considered in the future.
GOODIES
How do I unlock my rewards? Rewards are unlocked automatically after meeting the required conditions or redeeming the provided code.
How do I access early access? Eligible players will receive access instructions via the email associated with their purchase or registration.
I did not receive my reward email. What should I do? Please check your spam folder first. If you still cannot find it, contact our support team with your purchase details.
TECHNICAL
What are the system requirements? The minimum and recommended PC requirements will be listed on the games official store page before release.
The game will not launch. What should I do? Verify the game files, update your graphics drivers, and ensure your system meets the minimum requirements. If the issue persists, contact support.
How do I report a bug? You can report bugs through our official support page or community channels. Including screenshots and system information helps us investigate faster.

UBAU: TECHNO THIEF © 2026 Ubau: Techno Thief. Published by Absent Mind Studio. All rights reserved. Built by The SYMP Studio
